shots.positive_prompt: T-shirt front view, facing camera, centered, clean studio background. Exact product replication.
shots.negative_prompt: people, models, mannequin, hands, perspective, floating

shots.positive_prompt: T-shirt back view, rotated 180 degrees, show only back side. Clean studio. No front visible.
shots.negative_prompt: front print, neck hole front, people, models, mannequin
shots.hard_rules: 180 DEGREE ROTATION, NO PRINT ON BACK

shots.positive_prompt: T-shirt side angle, rotated 45 degrees. Show silhouette. Not front view.
shots.negative_prompt: front view, straight on, people, models

shots.positive_prompt: T-shirt flat lay, top-down 90° view, placed on surface. No model, no perspective, no floating.
shots.negative_prompt: mannequin, hanging, standing, perspective angle, people, shadows from standing

shots.positive_prompt: Close-up of t-shirt print or fabric. High detail, sharp focus.
shots.negative_prompt: full t-shirt, zoomed out, people, models

shots.positive_prompt: Professional studio fashion portrait of a model wearing the t-shirt. Medium shot from waist up. Model looking at camera, confident neutral pose. Clean solid background. High fashion lighting.
shots.negative_prompt: full body, messy background, outdoors, casual selfie, awkward pose, distorted face
shots.hard_rules: FRONT VIEW ONLY. MODEL MUST NOT COVER THE SHIRT DESIGN WITH HANDS.

shots.positive_prompt: Model wearing the t-shirt, dynamic 3/4 side angle. Torso twist, looking off-camera. Editorial pose, showing how the fabric drapes. Clean studio background.

shots.positive_prompt: Model facing away from the camera, showing the back of the t-shirt. Clean studio background. Hair away from the upper back.
shots.negative_prompt: front print, model face, turning around, messy background
